comment.body: I want to question the SLR being bullish. I think it’s only bullish if BBB passes otherwise it’d be incredibly stupid to release more cash reserves into a market at ATH. It becomes more on the treasury to administer a good fiscal policy than on the fed to maintain its balance sheet. Basically it’ll push rates up. Just my thoughts. I don’t think they’ll do it without the tax bill signed
